description.value:
Access You're invited by a current member of the Eagle Knights or the People's Council.

You serve as an envoy of the ideals of Andoran, whether it's in a foreign court or on the field of battle. Your training in the Steel Falcons enables you to anticipate the attitudes of others to achieve your goals. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Size Up] action.

Special You can take this dedication even if you haven't taken more than two non-dedication feats from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.gVipISIgPjNbOUhk]{Eagle Knight} archetype.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.kVOWt6Uit7Ibrp6o]{Steel Falcon}
